seoTitle: North Lilydale vs North Scottsdale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between North Lilydale and North Scottsdale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: North Lilydale vs North Scottsdale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in North Lilydale and North Scottsdale.
heading: North Lilydale vs North Scottsdale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North Lilydale, Tasmania and North Scottsdale, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North Lilydale has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to North Scottsdale (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North Lilydale or North Scottsdale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North Lilydale has a flood risk score of 37/100, while North Scottsdale scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North Lilydale scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. North Scottsdale scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North Lilydale or North Scottsdale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North Lilydale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
